commands.review_summary:
The PR clears persisted auto-reply `modelProvider` and `model` runtime cache fields during new-session reset cleanup and adds regression coverage that explicit user overrides and unrelated behavior settings survive.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +93. Total +98 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: seed a persisted auto-reply session row with `modelProvider` and `model` but no explicit override, trigger `/new` or `/reset`, and current main can preserve those old fields before model resolution prefers them over configured defaults.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No new repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the reset semantics plus exact-head check/merge readiness.
